entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cicer arietinum L.) studied for growth and yield response in the Philippines

entities.name: PHILIPPINES
entities.description: The country where the chickpea growth and yield study was conducted

entities.name: FREQUENCY OF IRRIGATION
entities.description: The interval of water application used to determine its effect on chickpea growth and yield

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, measured in kg/ha

entities.name: DAYS FROM PLANTING TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The time duration from sowing until 50% of the plants have flowered

entities.name: DAYS FROM PLANTING TO HARVESTING
entities.description: The time duration from sowing until the crop is ready for harvest

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of pods produced by an individual chickpea plant

entities.name: FILLED PODS
entities.description: The number of pods containing developed seeds

entities.name: WEIGHT OF 100 SEEDS
entities.description: The combined mass of 100 seeds, used as an indicator of seed size

entities.name: ICCV 2
entities.description: A specific variety of chickpea tested in the study
